response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with deep experience in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and full-stack web/mobile/embedded work, but the resume shows minimal recent C++ experience (only a brief stint at National Instruments in 2007-2008 and a bachelor thesis project) and no demonstrated background in capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, SQL Server/Oracle, or the Windows platform. The role's mandatory requirements of 5-10 years hands-on C++ on Windows plus financial-services domain expertise are not met.
strengths: Long track record (20+ years) as a versatile software developer across multiple stacks
Some early C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a professional IDE product
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
concerns: No substantive recent C++ experience — primary languages are TS/Node and DLang
No capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or Summit platform exposure
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle experience or Windows-platform development focus

key_factors.factor: No financial services / capital markets domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform background
